lab_description: We focus on the research of general artificial intelligence, covering core directions such as machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, and their practical applications. Our research includes algorithm design, model optimization, technical innovation and industrial application of artificial intelligence. We prioritize papers that propose novel AI models, advance the practicality of AI algorithms, explore industrial-grade applications of AI technology, develop efficient AI methods, or promote the integration of AI with other disciplines.
